Customer Reviews

0.0
0 reviews
.review-avatar { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--primary-light); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; } .review-info { flex: 1; } .review-author { font-weight: 600; } .review-rating { color: #fbbf24; } .review-content { margin: 12px 0; } .review-actions { display: flex; gap: 16px; }
